auth.label: Access token
auth.description: Vercel personal access token used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create it in your Vercel Account Tokens settings.

actions.name: add_project_domain
actions.description: Add a domain to a Vercel project.

idOrName.description: Vercel project ID or project name.

name.description: Domain name to add to the project.

verified.description: Whether the domain is verified in Vercel.

items.description: Raw object payload returned by Vercel.

verification.description: Raw domain verification records returned by Vercel.

anyOf.description: Redirect target configured for the domain, or null when no redirect is set.

gitBranch.description: Git branch associated with the domain, when present.

customEnvironmentId.description: Custom environment ID associated with the domain, when present.

framework.description: Framework to set on the project.

nodeVersion.description: Node.js version to use for the project.

outputDirectory.description: Output directory for the project build.

directoryListing.description: Whether directory listing is enabled for the project.

publicSource.description: Whether the project source is public.

gitForkProtection.description: Whether Git fork protection is enabled for the project.

accountId.description: Owning account ID for the project.

nodeVersion.description: Configured Node.js version for the project.

updatedAt.description: Last project update timestamp in milliseconds.

link.description: Raw object payload returned by Vercel.

readyState.description: Deployment readiness state reported by Vercel.

target.description: Deployment target such as production or preview.

projectId.description: Vercel project ID for the deployment.

creator.description: Raw object payload returned by Vercel.

meta.description: Raw object payload returned by Vercel.

alias.description: Aliases currently assigned to the deployment.

latestDeployments.description: Most recent deployments attached to the project.

actions.name: create_project_env
actions.description: Create a Vercel project environment variable.

idOrName.description: Vercel project ID or project name.

target.description: Deployment targets that should receive this environment variable.

comment.description: Optional comment for the environment variable.

customEnvironmentIds.description: Custom environment IDs that should receive this environment variable.

target.description: Deployment targets that receive this environment variable.

gitBranch.description: Git branch name scoped to this environment variable, when present.

createdAt.description: Environment variable creation timestamp in milliseconds.

updatedAt.description: Last environment variable update timestamp in milliseconds.

comment.description: Comment attached to the environment variable, when present.

envs.description: Environment variables returned by Vercel after creation.

events.description: Webhook events that should trigger notifications.

projectIds.description: Project IDs that should trigger the webhook. Omit to receive events for all projects.

events.description: Webhook events configured on the webhook.

projectIds.description: Project IDs associated with the webhook, when scoped to specific projects.

teamId.description: Vercel team ID that owns the webhook, when present.

updatedAt.description: Last webhook update timestamp in milliseconds.

actions.name: delete_project_env

idOrUrl.description: Vercel deployment ID or deployment URL.

withGitRepoInfo.description: When true, include Git repository metadata in the deployment response.

target.description: Deployment target such as production or preview.

alias.description: Aliases currently assigned to the deployment.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

since.description: Pagination cursor for results created after this timestamp.

until.description: Pagination cursor for results created before this timestamp.

direction.description: Order in which to return deployment events.

builds.description: When true, include build events in the response.

payload.description: Raw object payload returned by Vercel.
